comments:
Diffusion model types for AI-generated content layers.

This module defines the generative AI models supported for LTGenerated
layer content. Includes image generation, video generation, 3D generation,
and image editing models.

## Supported Model Categories

**Image Generation:**
- Flux 2 (Black Forest Labs)
- Z-Image (Zhipu AI)
- Qwen Image 2509 (Alibaba)
- Stable Diffusion XL

**Video Generation:**
- Wan 2.2 (Alibaba)
- CogVideoX (Tsinghua)
- Stable Video Diffusion
- ATI (Advanced Text-to-Image-to-Video)

**3D Generation:**
- Hunyuan 3D (Tencent)
- Trellis 2 (Microsoft)

**Image Editing:**
- Qwen Image Edit 2511
- Z-Image Edit
- InstructPix2Pix

**Motion Control:**
- MotionCtrl (pose-based video)
- Uni3C (camera control)
- WanMove (trajectory-based)
- Time-to-Move (TTM)

## Architecture

This module mirrors `Lattice.Export` from the Haskell backend, ensuring
type-level compatibility for serialization between PureScript UI and
Haskell generation backend.

## Architecture Note

This module exceeds the standard 500-line limit due to schema coherence.
The unified DiffusionModel type wraps all 5 model categories (Image, Video,
3D, Edit, Motion), requiring their enums to be co-located. The parser
`diffusionModelFromString` dispatches to category-specific parsers that
must be defined in the same module.

declarations.comments:
Image generation models.

These models generate static images from text prompts and optional
reference images.
declarations.title: ImageModel

declarations.comments: Convert image model to string identifier.
declarations.title: imageModelToString

declarations.comments: Parse image model from string.
declarations.title: imageModelFromString

declarations.comments: Check if model is optimized for fast generation.
declarations.title: isImageModelFast

declarations.comments: Check if model is optimized for high quality.
declarations.title: isImageModelHighQuality

declarations.comments:
Video generation models.

These models generate video sequences from text prompts, reference images,
and optional motion guidance.
declarations.title: VideoModel

declarations.comments: Convert video model to string identifier.
declarations.title: videoModelToString

declarations.comments: Parse video model from string.
declarations.title: videoModelFromString

declarations.comments:
Maximum frames supported by model.

Returns the maximum number of frames the model can generate in a single
inference pass.
declarations.title: videoModelMaxFrames

declarations.comments: Maximum resolution (width or height) supported by model.
declarations.title: videoModelMaxResolution

declarations.comments:
3D generation models.

These models generate 3D meshes, point clouds, or volumetric data
from images or text prompts.
declarations.title: Model3D

declarations.comments: Convert 3D model to string identifier.
declarations.title: model3DToString

declarations.comments: Parse 3D model from string.
declarations.title: model3DFromString

declarations.comments:
Image editing models.

These models perform targeted edits on existing images based on
text instructions or mask regions.
declarations.title: EditModel

declarations.comments: Convert edit model to string identifier.
declarations.title: editModelToString

declarations.comments: Parse edit model from string.
declarations.title: editModelFromString

declarations.comments:
Motion control models.

These models add motion guidance to video generation via camera paths,
pose sequences, or trajectory data.
declarations.title: MotionModel

declarations.comments: Convert motion model to string identifier.
declarations.title: motionModelToString

declarations.comments: Parse motion model from string.
declarations.title: motionModelFromString

declarations.comments:
Unified diffusion model type.

Wraps all model categories into a single sum type for use in
LTGenerated layer content.
declarations.title: DiffusionModel

declarations.comments:
Convert unified model to string identifier.

Prefixes with category for unambiguous parsing.
declarations.title: diffusionModelToString

declarations.comments:
Parse unified model from string.

Expects format "category:model-id".
declarations.title: diffusionModelFromString

declarations.comments: Get the category of a diffusion model.
declarations.title: diffusionModelCategory

declarations.comments:
All image generation models.

Use this to iterate over available models for UI dropdowns, validation,
or capability checks.
declarations.title: allImageModels

declarations.comments: All video generation models.
declarations.title: allVideoModels

declarations.comments: All 3D generation models.
declarations.title: all3DModels

declarations.comments: All image editing models.
declarations.title: allEditModels

declarations.comments: All motion control models.
declarations.title: allMotionModels

declarations.comments:
Filter models by a predicate.

Example: `filterImageModels isImageModelFast` returns only fast models.

declarations.comments: Filter video models by a predicate.
declarations.title: filterVideoModels

declarations.comments: Get all models that support a minimum frame count.
declarations.title: videoModelsWithMinFrames

declarations.comments: Get all models that support a minimum resolution.
declarations.title: videoModelsWithMinResolution

declarations.comments:
Map a function over all image models.

Useful for building UI components or serialization.

declarations.comments: Map a function over all video models.
declarations.title: mapVideoModels

declarations.comments: Map a function over all 3D models.

declarations.comments: Map a function over all edit models.

declarations.comments: Map a function over all motion models.

declarations.comments:
Compose model lookup with transformation.

Example: `lookupAndTransform imageModelFromString imageModelToString`
creates a round-trip function.
declarations.title: lookupAndTransform

declarations.comments:
First image model in enumeration order (for default values).

Uses Bounded instance - change the instance to change the default.
